title: Source
description: A news source available through TheNewsAPI.

source_id.description: Unique identifier for the source (e.g., techcrunch-us-en).

domain.description: Domain name of the news source (e.g., techcrunch.com).

language.description: Primary language code of the source (e.g., en).

locale.description: Country code locale of the source (e.g., us, gb).
